overall.description: A cinematic nighttime view of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza featuring two giant holographic koi fish swimming between neon-lit skyscrapers. The stationary camera captures the mesmerizing loop of the orange and blue holographic projections as they circle each other above the bustling street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city plaza with holographic displays

events.description: orange holographic koi crosses the center of the frame moving leftward, passing in front of the blue koi
orange holographic koi reaches the left side of the frame and begins arcing back toward the right

agents.ego_description: stationary camera observing the holographic fish display in the city plaza

entered.detail: large glowing orange holographic koi fish swimming in mid-air
large glowing cyan holographic koi fish swimming in mid-air
tall skyscraper with vertical yellow neon lights and green signage at the top
massive glass and steel tower with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
dark high-rise building with blue neon advertisements on the facade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza at night, dominated by towering neon-lit skyscrapers. Two giant holographic koi fish—one orange and one blue—swim through the air between the buildings. The orange fish moves steadily from right to left across the frame, passing in front of the blue fish near the center. Below, blurred lights suggest sparse traffic and pedestrians moving through the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city plaza with holographic displays

events.description: orange holographic koi crosses the center again moving rightward, completing the crossing pattern
orange holographic koi returns to the right side, looping back to the original starting position

agents.ego_description: stationary camera observing the holographic fish display in the city plaza

segments.scene_description: The orange holographic koi continues its circuit, arcing back from the left side toward the right. It crosses paths with the blue koi again near the center of the frame. The neon-lit skyscrapers remain constant in the background as the fish complete their synchronized swimming loop, with the orange fish returning to its starting position on the right side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a mesmerizing, synchronized loop of holographic creatures gliding through a neon-drenched cyberpunk plaza. It begins with a wide view of towering skyscrapers where a giant orange holographic koi swims steadily from right to left, crossing paths with a blue counterpart near the center of the frame. As the orange fish continues its fluid motion, it arcs back from the left toward the right, weaving through the air against the backdrop of glowing city lights and blurred pedestrian traffic. The scene then follows the fish as they complete their orbital circuit, with the orange koi returning to its original position on the right. This continuous movement emphasizes the rhythmic, cyclical nature of the projections within the static, futuristic cityscape.
